title: Device(headset) is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Verify a headset device is successfully registered to the Cloud after pairing with the Lens app.
steps: Start the Lens app with no headsets connected.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account.
Pair a new headset with the app.
Refresh the Lens Cloud inventory page.
expected: Device list shows only Mobile app initially. After pairing and refreshing, the new headset appears on the inventory list.
